name: connector-action-stub-skill
description: Generate dry-run stubs and approval checklists for connector actions.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check tests/*.test.js
scripts.smoke: node src/cli.js --help && node src/cli.js --version && node src/cli.js plan examples/crm-manifest.json > /tmp/connector-action-stub-skill-plan.md && node src/cli.js fixture examples/crm-manifest.json > /tmp/connector-action-stub-skill-fixture.json && node src/cli.js skill examples/crm-manifest.json > /tmp/connector-action-stub-skill-guide.md && grep -q "Connector dry-run plan" /tmp/connector-action-stub-skill-plan.md && grep -q "stable-fixture" /tmp/connector-action-stub-skill-fixture.json && grep -q "Approval Requirements" /tmp/connector-action-stub-skill-guide.md
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
